creator: hlh@restart.be
text:
(In reply to dirkx from comment #289)

It would be very nice to test with the last instance:

Branch rtsx_set_sd_clock (be2a08c) which work very well on my RTL8411B.

I am interested to know your type of device and the make of your computer.

Can you test on a spare card something like:

dd if=/dev/random of=/dev/mmcsd0 bs=8192 count=10000

To see if the issue is only for RTS5229
